decide.title: Make the choice the Convent would not write for you

subtitle.text: The cycle's gene-encoded trap. Or the place it finally breaks.

description: You hold the Five Vessels. The Unification ritual waits. The Sealing would name you Sovereign , Resistance III, suspended only by your own mortality.
Four paths open, all of them finishing what the Nightwarden could not:
→ Ascend, and become the next Crimson King , the cycle, unbroken.
→ Ascend, and REFUSE the pattern , the thing no Heir has done.
→ Take off the collar by becoming the crime, the Mass Accumulate.
→ Walk away. Let the cycle end with you, content to have understood it.
The Convent does not write the next chapter. You do.
